name: Household settings & delete rules
description: Complete household settings and delete safeguards on top of the existing household CRUD endpoints. Backend: extend PATCH /api/v1/households/:id (admin-only; update name, default currency, timezone, default visibility preference) and harden DELETE /api/v1/households/:id (admin-only; blocks delete if other active members exist). Frontend: Household Settings page with form for metadata fields and a danger-zone Delete section with confirmation dialog. Per docs/product-specs/household-management.md. Does NOT include member management or household hard-delete semantics.
evidence: ./init.sh, pnpm --filter worker typecheck, pnpm --filter worker test
